heading: Construction of fishways
label: 608 Construction of fishways
text: Whenever river and harbor improvements shall be found to operate (whether by lock and dam or otherwise), as obstructions to the passage of fish, the Secretary of the Army may, in his discretion, direct and cause to be constructed practical and sufficient fishways, to be paid for out of the general appropriations for the streams on which such fishways may be constructed.
notes: CodificationSection is from act , the Rivers and Harbors Appropriation Act of 1888.Aug. 11, 1888

Change of NameDepartment of War designated Department of the Army and title of Secretary of War changed to Secretary of the Army by section 205(a) of , .
